mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_progress lp INNER JOIN chapters c ON lp.chapter_id = c.id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} AND c.course_id = #{courseId} AND lp.is_completed = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapters WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_progress (user_id, chapter_id, last_position, is_completed, completed_at, first_watched_at, last_watched_at, total_watch_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{lastPosition}, #{isCompleted}, #{completedAt}, #{firstWatchedAt}, #{lastWatchedAt}, #{totalWatchTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_watch_time), 0) FROM learning_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId}
